title: Potentiometric Studies on the Complexes of Some Transition Metal lons and Rare-Earth Ions with 3 - Phenyl-2-thio-2,4, (1H, 3H) quinazolinedione
author: DEBPAK H. RAHEJA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Physical Chemistry Laboratory, Institute of Science, Bombay-400 032 

  Manuscript received 5 October 1983, accepted 30 May 1984  

 Complexation equilibrium of metal complexes of Cu  I I  , Zn  l I  , Cd   I I  , Ni   I I  , Mn  I I   and rare-earth metals. like Nd   I I I   Sm   I I  , Gd  I I I   and Dy  I I I   with 3-pbenyl-2- thio--2,4, (1 H , 3 H ) quinazolinedione have been studied Potentiometrically. The proton dissociation constant of the reagent and the dissociation constant of its metal complexes have been determined by Celvin  p H titration technique as adopted by Irving and 
Rossotti at 27±0.1° and at ionic strength,  \(\mu\) =-0.1 M  in 3:1 (v/v) dioxane·water medium. The order of stability constants of the complexes is found to be Cu   I I   >Cd   I I   > Ni   I I   > Zn  l I   > Mn   I I   The stability constants in case of rare-earth metal ions have been investigated only to know their ionic character
